title: 10 best herbal creams for cold sore
description: Symphytum officinale, also known as comfrey, creams helps with cold sore because of its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The cream's active compounds, such as allantoin and rosmarinic acid, accelerate wound healing and reduce pain and inflammation associated with cold sores. Additionally, comfrey creams have antimicrobial properties that help prevent bacterial and viral infections from entering the wound, promoting a faster recovery and reducing the risk of scarring.
